modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error running query on ZZ_PAYROLL_DISTRIB_NOPREDICATE table.

full_description_text: I tried to run a query on Banner ODS. But it gave me an error. It says something like "table or view does not exist." I don’t know what that means. I just want to get my data.

description: I tried to run a query on Banner ODS. But it gave me an error. It says something like "table or view does not exist." I don’t know what that means. I just want to get my data.
